title: Error when closing group tab with SSH conn
author: procajlok
body_snippet:
## Current Behavior
When i closing group tab with SSH connection, improve error.

```
Exception Message
"cant access to delete object. 
Object name: 'ConnectionWindow'."

Stack trace
   w System.Windows.Forms.Control.MarshaledInvoke(Control caller, Delegate method, Object[] args, Boolean synchronous)
   w System.Windows.Forms.Control.Invoke(Delegate method, Object[] args)
   w System.Windows.Forms.Control.Invoke(Delegate method)
   w mRemoteNG.UI.Window.ConnectionWindow.Prot_Event_Cl...

iterations.description: Issue matches the same ConnectionWindow disposed-object close-path as #3069 and is a candidate for closure after PR #3106 merge and retest.

Please retest on latest fork RC candidate build; if no longer reproducible, this can be closed as duplicate of #3069.
